## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Example Workflow

Show a practical example of how this should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other options you thought about.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, compatibility notes, or constraints.
